Off Calendar Aug-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Sean Moriarty, Esq. of Cesari Werner Moriarty, Tel. 415.391.1113, for Defendant and opposing party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF VANESSA SCHAFER'S Motion For Leave To Conduct Discovery Of Defendant Ed Byrd's Financial Condition is Denied, without prejudice. Moving party failed to timely file the motion in compliance with CCP 1005(b). Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
